caption:
Claude Code installs in 5 minutes ✷

Monday = Claude Code series.

3 STEPS only:
- STEP 1: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code (1 min)
- STEP 2: set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var (2 min)
- STEP 3: cd into your repo, ask in plain English (1 min)

1 npm command = AI coding companion instantly.
Dream Team's Windy/Robo/Collie/Manneungi all use Claude Code daily.
